## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Explain the why behind the changes, not just what was changed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue)

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. Include any relevant details for your test configuration.

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass locally

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## Database Changes

- [ ] No database schema changes
- [ ] Database migration created (in `packages/db/prisma/migrations/`)
- [ ] Migration tested locally
- [ ] Migration is backward compatible

## Environment Variables

- [ ] No new environment variables needed
- [ ] New environment variables documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Variables added to CI/CD environment configuration

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes documented with migration guide
- [ ] Version bump considered (major/minor/patch)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or demo links here for UI/UX changes.

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance metrics measured and acceptable
- [ ] Performance improvements documented

## Deployment Notes

Any special deployment instructions, data migrations, or post-deployment steps:

## Reviewers

Tag relevant reviewers below:
- @reviewer1
- @reviewer2
